sub_modules.aes_sbox: Combinational AES forward S-box lookup used by SubBytes and key schedule RotWord/SubWord.
sub_modules.aes_subbytes: Applies the AES S-box independently to all sixteen state bytes.
sub_modules.aes_shiftrows: Performs the AES encryption ShiftRows byte permutation using column-major AES state ordering.
sub_modules.aes_mixcolumns: Performs AES MixColumns on each 32-bit state column using GF(2^8) multiply-by-2 and multiply-by-3 logic.
sub_modules.aes_key_expand_round: Computes one AES-128 round key from the previous round key using inline key expansion and Rcon.
sub_modules.aes_round: Combinational AES encryption round: SubBytes, ShiftRows, optional MixColumns, then AddRoundKey; final round omits MixColumns.
